description: SQL injection in try block and tainted error message in catch block via exception path

expected.notes: request.getParameter flows to executeQuery via string concat — SQL injection in try body
AST pattern detects executeQuery with string concatenation — SQL injection

request.getParameter flows to response.getWriter().println at line 12 — user input reflected in error response. Replaces the retired java.xss.getwriter_print AST pattern: reflected XSS is now a taint sink (Sink(Cap::HTML_ESCAPE)), taint-confirmed rather than flagged on every writer call.
